seo.title: Charlotte Event Planners | Luxury Events & Weddings
seo.description: Charlotte Event Planners designs luxury weddings, birthdays, picnics, and elevated events with calm guidance, refined aesthetics, and seamless execution.
seo.keywords: Charlotte event planner, Charlotte wedding planner, luxury event planner Charlotte, Charlotte party planner, luxury picnics Charlotte

brand.name: Event Planners
brand.footerDescription: Luxury event planning for weddings, birthdays, picnics, and thoughtfully designed celebrations in Charlotte.

hero.title: Events that feel effortless, look exquisite, and stay with you forever.
hero.text: We design weddings, birthdays, luxury picnics, and unforgettable celebrations for hosts who want beauty without the overwhelm. Every detail is curated. Every moment feels seamless.
hero.cardTitle: Beautifully managed events with calm, polished execution.
cardList: Trusted vendor coordination & flawless event day flow

proof.title: A luxury planning experience designed to feel personal, calm, and unmistakably elevated.

services.title: Celebrations styled with intention and executed without stress.

items.title: Weddings
items.description: Refined planning, romantic design direction, and flawless day-of coordination for celebrations that feel deeply personal and beautifully seamless.

items.title: Luxury Picnics
items.description: Styled outdoor gatherings with layered tablescapes, florals, and effortless hospitality for proposals, date nights, showers, and intimate celebrations.

items.title: Birthdays
items.description: Milestone moments designed with polish, warmth, and statement-making detail so guests feel cared for and every photo feels frame-worthy.

items.title: Corporate Events
items.description: Elevated launches, dinners, brand activations, and team celebrations executed with precision, hospitality, and premium visual impact.

portfolio.title: Visual stories crafted to feel cinematic, intimate, and unforgettable.

about.title: We believe the most memorable events are the ones where you feel fully present.
about.alt: Luxury event planner styling a tablescape
paragraphs: Charlotte Event Planners was created for hosts who want a celebration that feels beautiful, intentional, and entirely taken care of. Our work blends creative direction, elevated styling, thoughtful logistics, and a calm presence behind the scenes.
From your first inspiration board to the final candle being lit, we shape every detail with care so your event looks stunning and feels effortless for you and your guests.

points.title: Passion
points.description: Every event begins with your story and the feeling you want guests to leave with.

points.title: Creativity
points.description: We layer textures, florals, lighting, and thoughtful details into a cohesive luxury experience.

points.title: Attention to detail
points.description: Timelines, vendors, styling, and guest flow are handled with polished precision.

benefits.title: Luxury is not just how it looks. It's how effortless it feels.

items.title: Stress-free experience
items.description: We handle the moving parts, problem-solving, and behind-the-scenes flow so you can focus on celebrating.

items.title: Personalized design
items.description: Every proposal is tailored to your taste, your guests, and the atmosphere you want to create.

items.title: Local Charlotte expertise
items.description: We source trusted venues, creatives, rentals, and hospitality partners that elevate every experience.

items.title: High-end execution
items.description: From styling to scheduling, every detail is managed with polished precision and premium care.

testimonials.title: What it feels like to work with us.

items.quote: I didn't have to chase a single detail. The design was stunning, the timeline was seamless, and I actually got to enjoy my own wedding.
items.name: Danielle & Marcus
items.subtitle: Charlotte Wedding

items.quote: Our daughter's birthday felt like a magazine spread, but still warm and personal. Every guest kept asking who planned it.
items.name: Kiana T.
items.subtitle: Milestone Birthday Celebration

items.quote: The luxury picnic was breathtaking. It felt romantic, elevated, and completely effortless from start to finish.
items.name: Brianna R.
items.subtitle: Luxury Picnic Experience

items.quote: From vendor communication to the final styling details, everything was handled with calm confidence and true professionalism.
items.name: Lauren P.
items.subtitle: Private Event Client

process.title: Your celebration, expertly guided from vision to flawless execution.

items.title: Consultation
items.description: We begin with your vision, priorities, guest experience, style preferences, and the details that matter most.

items.title: Planning & Design
items.description: We curate the concept, vendors, layout, styling, and timeline into a cohesive plan that feels refined and aligned.

items.title: Execution
items.description: On event day, we direct every moving part with grace so the atmosphere feels calm, polished, and unforgettable.

ctaBanner.title: Let's create something unforgettable.
ctaBanner.text: Whether you are planning a wedding, an intimate luxury picnic, or a milestone celebration, we'll make it feel effortless and elevated from beginning to end.

contact.title: Tell us what you're dreaming up.
contact.text: Share your event type, date, and vision, and we'll reach out with next steps to begin designing your experience.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your vision, ideal date, guest count, and anything you want us to know.
form.successMessage: Thank you! Your inquiry has been sent.
